description: Creating domain architecture comparison and GO decision table visualization
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1, 1.5]})

# === Panel A: Domain Architecture Comparison ===
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title('A. Domain Architecture Comparison: B7FXQ8 HSP20A vs Characterized sHSPs', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

proteins = [
    ('B7FXQ8 HSP20A (P. tricornutum)', 163, [(1, 46, '#FFB347'), (47, 155, '#4ECDC4'), (156, 163, '#FF6B6B')]),
    ('P04792 HSPB1 (Human)', 205, [(1, 86, '#FFB347'), (87, 176, '#4ECDC4'), (177, 205, '#FF6B6B')]),
    ('P02511 CRYAB (Human)', 175, [(1, 67, '#FFB347'), (68, 155, '#4ECDC4'), (156, 175, '#FF6B6B')]),
    ('P15992 HSP26 (Yeast)', 214, [(1, 95, '#FFB347'), (96, 186, '#4ECDC4'), (187, 214, '#FF6B6B')]),
    ('P0C058 IbpB (E. coli)', 142, [(1, 30, '#FFB347'), (31, 123, '#4ECDC4'), (124, 142, '#FF6B6B')]),
]

y_positions = list(range(len(proteins)-1, -1, -1))

for i, (name, length, domains) in enumerate(proteins):
    y = y_positions[i]
    ax1.barh(y, length, height=0.5, color='#E8E8E8', edgecolor='gray', linewidth=0.5)
    for start, end, color in domains:
        ax1.barh(y, end-start+1, left=start-1, height=0.5, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    ax1.text(-5, y, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8)
    ax1.text(length+3, y, f'{length} aa', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8)

ax1.annotate('IAI (pos 150)', xy=(150, 4), xytext=(175, 4.7),
            fontsize=7, ha='center', arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red'), color='red')

ax1.set_xlim(-120, 250)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, len(proteins) + 0.5)
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_yticks([])

legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FFB347', label='N-terminal extension'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#4ECDC4', label='Alpha-crystallin domain (ACD)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FF6B6B', label='C-terminal extension'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# === Panel B: GO Decision Table ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('B. GO Term Decision Table for B7FXQ8 HSP20A', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['GO:0051082', 'unfolded protein binding', 'OBSOLETE', 'Must replace', 'N/A', 'Cannot use'],
    ['GO:0044183', 'protein folding chaperone', 'Active', '25 reviewed sHSPs', 'ISS', 'RECOMMENDED'],
    ['GO:0140309', 'holdase activity', 'Active', '0 sHSPs (new)', 'ISS', 'ALTERNATIVE'],
    ['GO:0051787', 'misfolded protein binding', 'Active', '0 sHSPs', 'ISS', 'OPTIONAL'],
    ['GO:0009408', 'response to heat', 'Active', 'Paralog has it', 'ISS/IEA', 'ADD (BP)'],
    ['GO:0005737', 'cytoplasm', 'Active', 'Common for sHSPs', 'ISS', 'ADD (CC)'],
]

col_labels = ['GO Term', 'Name', 'Status', 'sHSP Precedent', 'Ev. Code', 'Recommendation']

table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data, colLabels=col_labels, 
                  loc='center', cellLoc='center')

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1.0, 1.8)

# Color code rows
rec_colors = {
    'Cannot use': '#FFCCCC',
    'RECOMMENDED': '#CCFFCC',
    'ALTERNATIVE': '#FFFFCC',
    'OPTIONAL': '#E8E8FF',
    'ADD (BP)': '#CCFFCC',
    'ADD (CC)': '#CCFFCC',
}

ncols = len(col_labels)
for i in range(len(table_data)):
    rec = table_data[i][5]
    for j in range(ncols):
        cell = table[i+1, j]
        if rec in rec_colors:
            cell.set_facecolor(rec_colors[rec])

for j in range(ncols):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#4472C4')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('go_decision_table.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("GO decision table saved.")
